title: DirectorsChair Server — E2E Test Catalog (PLACEHOLDER)
description: Reserved for the future server. Same schema as desktop.json so the orchestrator, bug registry, and report absorb server suites with zero framework changes. `status: planned` cases are excluded from coverage math until the server exists and their `automation` is wired to a real suite (contract tests, API integration, auth, sync).

cases.title: Sign in issues a valid token; refresh coalesces
Push/pull round-trips a project without data loss
Blob change-detection uploads only modified assets
